text:
THAW is the 11th track on the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack 02, as well as the 11th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album. It was composed and arranged by Kohta Yamamoto.

Musical motifs

This song uses a leitmotif from Ashes on The Fire.

All occurrences

Episode 79 - Eren and Zeke reach the fateful day in Grisha's memories
Episode 81 - Gabi manages to redeem herself in Kaya's eyes
Episode 84 - In a flashback, Jean meets with a remorseful Hange

Navigation
